plugins.name: toolbelt
plugins.description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org — set up assistants, services, and playbooks in one conversation.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: An always-on digital Chief of Staff for founders and executives. Turns a noisy inbox, calendar, and meeting stream into a clear operating picture — email triage, meeting prep, daily briefs, and follow-through. Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).
